candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not total current assets; only a specific asset category.
Balancing/subtotal line for non-current assets, not current assets.
Wrong section; non-current rather than current assets.

candidates.row_label: Impairment on non-current assets held for sale
candidates.why: Cash flow statement item, not a balance sheet current assets total.
Direct balance-sheet match for cash and cash equivalents.

candidates.row_label: Cash at bank and in hand
candidates.why: Cash component, but less complete than the reported total cash and cash equivalents line.
Restricted cash is usually excluded from CHE baseline unless part of reported cash equivalents; not preferred here.
Not a balance-sheet cash balance.
Cash flow line, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Net increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Period flow, not ending cash balance.
Direct match for total current liabilities.
Balancing/subtotal artifact rather than the clean reported total.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Best direct match for short-term debt/current debt total; excludes need to sum components if this line is the reported total.
Could be a component of short-term debt, but not the full amount.
Represents current portion of long-term debt, but may omit other short-term borrowings if used alone.

variables.notes: Selected the clean total short-term debt line. Although recent preview values are blank, the label is semantically exact and preferable to component-based alternatives.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Tangible asset component only, not total PPE.
Gross amount for only one PPE subcomponent, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and impairment losses of Other tangible assets
candidates.why: Contra-asset for one subcomponent, not PPE total.
Cash flow adjustment, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of other tangible assets and prepayments
candidates.why: Capital expenditure flow, not PPE balance.

candidates.row_label: Proceeds from the sale of other (in)tangible assets
candidates.why: Disposal cash flow, not PPE balance.

variables.notes: Chose a balance-sheet label outside the shortlist because 'Total Tangibles' is the clearest exact row for total/net PPE under IFRS-style presentation and is preferable to individual components such as vessels or other tangible assets. | Auto-flag: best candidate confidence 0.32 < 0.65

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Direct match for operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash from (used in) operating activities

variables.notes: Preferred the broader row label that covers both positive and negative years; included the simpler synonymous label as a fallback priority.
